zh.Melo, Gouveia, Guarda, Portugal: 葡萄牙瓜亞達古維亞美路
zh.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barroso是Egas Gomes Guedão和Urraca Vázquez de Ambia的女兒，於大約1174年出生在葡萄牙。她於大約1190年與Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在西班牙。

zh-hans.Melo, Gouveia, Guarda, Portugal: 葡萄牙瓜亞達古維亞美路
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barroso是Egas Gomes Guedão和Urraca Vázquez de Ambia的女儿，于大约1174年出生在葡萄牙。她于大约1190年与Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: Viegas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Antonio, Jose, Carlos, Alfredo, Ana, Arlindo, Aurelio, Fernanda, Fernando, Francisco, Haroldo, Joaquin, Julio.  Portuguese Joao, Martinho.

Portuguese: patronymic derived from a compound of Arabic or Jewish ben ‘son’ + the medieval personal name Egas . This surname is also found in western India, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.

variants.name: Egas
meanings: Spanish: from the medieval personal name Egas, probably of Visigothic origin. This surname is very rare in Spain; it is found mainly in Ecuador. Compare Venegas .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barroso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jorge, Manuel, Jesus, Mario, Fernando, Francisco, Angel, Carlos, Jose Luis.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Margarida, Paulo.
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in an area of clay or loamy soil, from barroso ‘clayey, loamy’ (from barro ‘loam’).

variants.name: Barrozo
meanings: Galician and Portuguese: variant of   Barroso  .

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barroso was born about 1174, in Portugal as the daughter of Egas Gomes Guedão and Urraca Vázquez de Ambia. She married Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela about 1190. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barroso est née environ 1174, à Portugal, fille d’Egas Gomes Guedão et Urraca Vázquez de Ambia. Elle a épousé Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela environ 1190. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barroso wurde um 1174 in Portugal, als Tochter von Egas Gomes Guedão und Urraca Vázquez de Ambia geboren. Sie hat um 1190 Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barroso è nata il circa 1174 nel Portogallo come figlia di Egas Gomes Guedão e Urraca Vázquez de Ambia. Lei sposato Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela circa 1190. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel Spagna.

ja.Melo, Gouveia, Guarda, Portugal: ポルトガルグアルダゴウベアメロ
ja.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barrosoは約1174年にポルトガルでEgas Gomes GuedãoとUrraca Vázquez de Ambiaの娘として生まれた。約1190年にAlferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizelaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はスペインで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barroso(은)는 대략 1174년 포르투갈에서 Egas Gomes Guedão(와)과 Urraca Vázquez de Ambia의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 스페인에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barroso nasceu aproximadamente 1174, em Portugal filha de Egas Gomes Guedão e Urraca Vázquez de Ambia. Ela casou-se com Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela aproximadamente 1190. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barroso родилась около 1174 г. в местности Португалия. Её родителей звали Egas Gomes Guedão и Urraca Vázquez de Ambia. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela около 1190 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Urraca Viegas de Barroso nació aproximadamente 1174, en Portugal como hija de Egas Gomes Guedão y Urraca Vázquez de Ambia. Se casó con Alferes-Mor Soeiro Raimundes de Riba de Vizela aproximadamente 1190. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en España.
